questionHtml:
In an ecosystem, in the transfer of carbon from producers to consumers, what is carbon transferred as?

I. Carbon dioxide

II. Protein

III. Hydrogencarbonate ions

A. I only

B. II only

C. I and II only

D. I and III only

meta.title: In an ecosystem, in the transfer of carbon from producers to consumers, what is carbon transferred as? I. Carbon dioxide II. Protein III. Hydrogencarbonate ions A. I only B. II onl
